response.justification: The candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer, but his profile is fundamentally misaligned with this role. The position requires 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows plus SQL Server/Oracle and fixed-income or capital-markets domain expertise. His professional C++ experience amounts to roughly six months at National Instruments ending in 2015, his database background is MongoDB/MySQL rather than SQL Server/Oracle, and his only finance-adjacent role (RIDE Capital) was TypeScript/GraphQL web development, not capital markets systems. Nearly every mandatory requirement is unmet.
strengths: Long, varied senior engineering career with strong testing, TDD, and CI/CD practices
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (DLang microservices handling millions of requests/sec)
Some systems-level C/C++ exposure (NI LabWindows/CVI components, C++ audio thesis project)
concerns: Professional C++ experience is ~6 months and ended in 2015, far short of the mandatory 5-10 years on Windows
No fixed income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain experience; closest role was fintech web development
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB and MySQL

key_factors.factor: Missing capital markets / fixed income domain
Strong general engineering seniority and craftsmanship
